title.en: The Void Heaven Dao Body is not only a system, ...

content.en:
The Void Heaven Dao Body is not only a system, but also a practice.

Ye Tian cultivated the Void Heaven Dao Body, and he had to cultivate his whole body step by step.

Refining skin, bones, meat, blood, tendons, and internal organs, and then refining the soul......

These steps felt similar to when they first cultivated, but they were fundamental changes, transforming the physical body with the rules of the Void Heaven Diagram and casting the Void Heaven Dao Body.

And each step needs some corresponding resources, fortunately, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor sent resources, otherwise he would not have been able to cultivate into the Void Heaven Dao Body.

Ye Tian had already been familiar with the exercises in the past year, and he had become proficient in cultivation, so with the resources, Ye Tian began to cultivate from refining skins.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's progress was very fast, skin, bones, flesh and blood, tendons and veins, and internal organs...... It's changing all the time.

In a flash, a full 3,000 years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian had completed the refining of all the body positions of the Void Heaven Dao Body, and even completed the soul refining.

In an instant, a fusion force was generated all over the body, and a void heaven Dao power flowed through the whole body, ushering in a huge physical transformation.

At this moment, Ye Tian truly forged the body of the Void Heaven Dao Body.

The power is rising, the soul is transforming, and even the divine power of the whole body is beginning to transform.

The only thing that made Ye Tian feel pity was that eight percent of his true blood had been refined, a special kind of blood, not true blood, nor ordinary blood, but the blood exclusive to the Void Heaven Dao Body.

Ye Tian gave this blood a name, called Void Heaven True Blood.

In fact, this kind of blood does not have the characteristics of true blood at all, but its strength is not weaker than that of true blood.

As soon as the Void Heaven Dao Body was completed, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed.

......

On the ancestral monument.

Originally, Ye Tian fell to the 668th place on the list of god generals, but now his ranking has risen sharply.

No. 192 on the list of god generals: Wanfa god general, six-star peak god general

In a moment's time, Ye Tian's strength increased from a six-star mid-stage god general to a six-star peak god general, which really shocked everyone.

Suddenly, many people speculated that Ye Tian had definitely practiced an earth-shattering secret technique, and his strength could not improve before, because he was delayed by this secret technique.

And now, the secret technique has been completed, and its strength has skyrocketed to the peak of six stars.

There are even people who speculate that this secret art has something to do with Ye Tian becoming a personal disciple, and in the Xutian lineage, there are indeed rumors that the secret art practice achievements can become a personal disciple.

So, this statement is recognized.

Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed, and many god generals immediately regarded Ye Tian as a competitor, after all, with Ye Tian's talent and combat effectiveness, if he was promoted to a seven-star god general, he was definitely expected to enter the top 100 god generals.

If this is the case, then Ye Tian will be qualified to enter the ancestral monument space.

All of a sudden, many gods who were in the nineties of the god generals list felt pressure.

After Ye Tian cultivated into the Void Heaven Dao Body, he still didn't get out of the level, but began to practice the space-time transfer technique.

The Time and Space Shifting Technique is an incomparably powerful Escape Chaos Divine Ability, once this Chaos Divine Power is practiced, no one in the Divine General level will be able to kill him.

It is not even an exaggeration that some powerful Heavenly Monarchs don't want to catch him easily.

After all, this is the top Chaos Divine Power ranked 21st in the Chaos Divine Power, and it is also a space-time Chaos Divine Power, what a powerful Divine Power this is, if there is no certain means in the Heavenly Destiny Realm, how can you catch him?

It is not even an exaggeration that some waste material true ancestors, if they have a single means, may not be able to catch him.

Of course, the premise of everything is that Ye Tian can practice the space-time transfer technique.

In the following days, Ye Tian practiced the space-time transfer technique while cultivating the Xuanxu Technique.

After cultivating the Void Heaven Dao Body, Ye Tian's cultivation speed was very fast, and coupled with the fact that Shizun had also given him a lot of resources, his cultivation speed was naturally faster.

The Xuanxu Jue of the sixth layer of the entry realm began to rise to the peak of the sixth layer of the Xuanxu Jue, and then progressed towards the sixth layer of Xiaocheng.

And Ye Tian's six-star peak god general's combat power is also slowly stabilizing, and he is progressing towards the seven-star god general.

Another 2,000 years have passed, and Ye Tian's Xuanxuan Jue has broken through to the sixth layer of Dacheng realm, and his strength has finally completed a breakthrough, stepping into the early stage of the Seven Stars Divine General Combat Power.

At this time, he reached 109th on the God's list, and he was slowly improving, and could enter the top 100 at any time.

And the day of the opening of the ancestral monument space is getting closer and closer, so the top 100 challenges of the gods in the big universe are becoming more and more frequent, and some thick-skinned gods are even hiding, for fear of being challenged successfully, causing the ranking to fall out of the top 100.

And on this day, Ye Tian finally practiced the space-time transfer technique.

The moment he practiced the space-time shifting technique, his ranking directly entered the 94th place on the list of god generals, and he successfully ranked among the top 100 on the list of god generals.

"There are only a few decades left, and it is too late to condense the prototype of the Great Dao of Time and Space and the inscription of the Dao pattern, but it has finally entered the top 100 of the Divine Generals list and is qualified to enter the ancestral monument space. Maybe I can directly condense the prototype of the Time and Space Avenue in the ancestral monument space, and even engrave two patterns, so that the strength will skyrocket again!"

Ye Tian thought.

So, he went out.

When he got out of the customs, it immediately caused a sensation.

That's when the first challenge came.

"In the sea of waves, the Heavy Bone God will come to challenge the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi!"

Wanfa Daozi is Ye Tian's new name now, and it is also the respect that others have for Ye Tian, if you call Wanfa Divine General, then it is okay.

"Heavy Bone God General, it's him!"

Some of the Void Heaven Palace's gods and heavenly monarchs frowned.

Canglang Sea is just an ordinary big force, not even a Dao Ancestor, only one True Ancestor, but the Ancient Divine General is very extraordinary, the early stage of the Seven Stars Divine General, good at defense, the defense is extremely terrifying, and some weaker mid-stage Seven Star Divine Generals are difficult to break his defense.

The Heavy Bone God General is only weaker in attack power, so he ranks 102nd on the God General List, and has not yet entered the top 100 God Generals List, so he is very anxious.

No one expected that he would target Ye Tian.

Outside the Void Heaven Temple.

The Heavy Bone God will be dressed in defensive armor, standing in the void, and roaring loudly.

This time, he challenged Ye Tian to be selected temporarily, who let Ye Tian just enter the top 100.

Of course, he is not stupid, he is sure to challenge Ye Tian.

He admitted that Ye Tian's talent was very high, much higher than him, and his strength was improving rapidly, but the current Ye Tian was not necessarily better than him.

In his opinion, Ye Tian was only able to have the strength of the top 100 gods by using a certain secret technique, and there must be defects in other aspects, if he only had strong attack power and weak in other aspects, he would have a great chance of defeating Ye Tian.

After all, his defense is invincible, and he is not afraid of a god general who specializes in attack power.

Wow!

A figure appeared in front of the Heavy Bone Divine General, followed by a group of Divine Generals and the Heavenly Monarch.

This person is Ye Tian!

"You, you want to challenge me?"

Ye Tian stared at the Heavy Bone Divine General and said.
